title: MCP Server Registry
description: Master configuration listing all MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers available to the Ideas-Brillantes LLM assistant. Each entry describes the server name, connection details, human-readable description, and the capabilities it exposes.

servers.name: browser_use
servers.description: browser-use MCP server — provides a controlled Chromium browser instance for autonomous web navigation, DOM interaction, content extraction, and web screenshots. Powered by the browser-use Python library.

servers.name: memory
servers.description: claude-mem MCP server — provides persistent long-term memory using a hybrid SQLite + ChromaDB vector store. Supports semantic search, chronological retrieval, tagging, and memory lifecycle management.

servers.name: stitch
servers.description: stitch-mcp server — provides UI/UX design tools for extracting design tokens, retrieving generated code, capturing design screenshots, generating new screens from prompts, and managing design projects.
